elements.title: lang::report_page_073_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT kbi_c.fullname                                                   AS course,
       kbi_f.name                                                       AS forum,
       kbi_fd.name                                                      AS discussion,
       kbi_fp.subject                                                   AS post,
       kbi_u.id                                                         AS userid,
       kbi_u.firstname,
       kbi_u.lastname,
       kbi_fp.created,
       (SELECT COUNT(id) FROM mdl_forum_posts WHERE parent = kbi_fp.id) as count_reply,
       last_reply.time                                              AS last_reply_time,
       last_reply.firstname                                         AS last_reply_firstname,
       last_reply.lastname                                          AS last_reply_lastname,
       last_reply.id                                                AS last_reply_userid
FROM mdl_forum kbi_f
       LEFT JOIN mdl_forum_discussions kbi_fd ON kbi_fd.forum = kbi_f.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_forum_posts kbi_fp ON kbi_fp.discussion = kbi_fd.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_course kbi_c ON kbi_c.id = kbi_f.course
       LEFT JOIN mdl_user kbi_u ON kbi_u.id = kbi_fp.userid
       LEFT JOIN mdl_modules kbi_m ON kbi_m.name = 'forum'
       LEFT JOIN mdl_course_modules kbi_cm ON kbi_cm.module = kbi_m.id AND kbi_cm.course = kbi_c.id AND kbi_cm.instance = kbi_f.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT *
                  FROM (SELECT kbi_post.parent, kbi_post.created AS time, kbi_ur.firstname, kbi_ur.lastname, kbi_ur.id
                        FROM mdl_forum_posts kbi_post
                               JOIN mdl_user kbi_ur ON kbi_ur.id = kbi_post.userid
                               JOIN mdl_forum_discussions kbi_d ON kbi_d.id = kbi_post.discussion
                               JOIN mdl_forum kbi_f ON kbi_d.forum = kbi_f.id
                        WHERE kbi_ur.id > 0
                          AND CONCAT(kbi_post.parent, '-', kbi_post.created) IN(SELECT CONCAT(parent, '-', MAX(created))
                                                                        FROM mdl_forum_posts
                                                                        GROUP BY parent)
                        ORDER BY kbi_post.created DESC) p
                  GROUP BY p.parent, p.time, p.firstname, p.lastname, p.id) last_reply ON last_reply.parent = kbi_fp.id
WHERE kbi_u.id IS NOT NULL
